feed.title: SAP Community - SAP HANA Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP HANA Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP DBTech JDBC: [1034]: exceed maximum number of external connections: 30000
entry.content:
We are encountering the following issue, which is causing the application to crash with an OutOfMemoryError:

2025-05-14T11:32:28.083+0000 [APP/PROC/WEB/1] STDOUT {"msg":"HikariPool-f8fa4104-4da3-4158-ac34-e9144a6bf5f5#4b96fab2-0f12-4d41-855e-049c6b52e5af - Exception during pool initialization.","tenant_id":"4b96fab2-0f12-4d41-855e-049c6b52e5af","level":"ERROR","written_ts":"1747222348082802136","logger":"com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool","exception_type":"com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException","correlation_id":"9693e6ef-192f-421c-9224-c98ece3f4e28","written_at":"2025-05-14T11:32:28.082Z","thread":"Draft GC Timer","type":"log","exception_message":"SAP DBTech JDBC: [1034]: exceed maximum number of external connections: 30000","stacktrace":["com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.JDBCDriverException: SAP DBTech JDBC: [1034]: exceed maximum number of external connections: 30000","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.SQLExceptionSapDB._newInstance(SQLExceptionSapDB.java:209)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.exceptions.SQLExceptionSapDB.newInstance(SQLExceptionSapDB.java:42)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.packet.HReplyPacket._buildExceptionChain(HReplyPacket.java:842)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.packet.HReplyPacket.getSQLExceptionChain(HReplyPacket.java:196)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.packet.HReplyPacket.findSQLExceptionChain(HReplyPacket.java:670)","\tat com.sap.db.util.security.AuthenticationManager.authenticate(AuthenticationManager.java:197)","\tat com.sap.db.util.security.AuthenticationManager.authenticate(AuthenticationManager.java:196)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.ConnectionSapDB._authenticateAndConnectSession(ConnectionSapDB.java:6672)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.ConnectionSapDB._connectAnchor(ConnectionSapDB.java:3483)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.DriverSapDB._connect(DriverSapDB.java:3428)","\tat com.sap.db.jdbc.DriverSapDB.connect(DriverSapDB.java:3013)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.util.DriverDataSource.getConnection(DriverDataSource.java:138)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.PoolBase.newConnection(PoolBase.java:359)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.PoolBase.newPoolEntry(PoolBase.java:201)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.createPoolEntry(HikariPool.java:470)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.checkFailFast(HikariPool.java:561)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.pool.HikariPool.<init>(HikariPool.java:100)","\tat com.zaxxer.hikari.HikariDataSource.getConnection(HikariDataSource.java:112)","\tat com.sap.cloud.mt.runtime.GenericConnectionProviderOnePoolPerTenant.getConnection(GenericConnectionProviderOnePoolPerTenant.java:14)","\tat com.sap.cloud.mt.runtime.TenantAwareDataSource.getConnection(TenantAwareDataSource.java:66)","\tat org.springframework.jdbc.datasource.DataSourceTransactionManager.doBegin(DataSourceTransactionManager.java:269)","\tat org.springframework.transaction.support.AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.startTransaction(AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.java:400)","\tat org.springframework.transaction.support.AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.getTransaction(AbstractPlatformTransactionManager.java:373)","\tat com.sap.cds.framework.spring.config.datasource.SpringTransactionManager.begin(SpringTransactionManager.java:49)","\tat com.sap.cds.framework.spring.config.datasource.SpringTransactionManager.begin(SpringTransactionManager.java:36)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.persistence.JdbcPersistenceService.ensureTransaction(JdbcPersistenceService.java:98)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.handlerregistry.HandlerRegistryTools$DescribedHandler.process(HandlerRegistryTools.java:165)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.dispatch(ServiceImpl.java:194)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.emit(ServiceImpl.java:150)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.ServiceDelegator.emit(ServiceDelegator.java:33)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.services.AbstractCqnService.run(AbstractCqnService.java:53)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.InactiveHandler.defaultRead(InactiveHandler.java:95)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.handlerregistry.HandlerRegistryTools$DescribedHandler.process(HandlerRegistryTools.java:165)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.dispatch(ServiceImpl.java:207)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.emit(ServiceImpl.java:150)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.ServiceDelegator.emit(ServiceDelegator.java:33)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftServiceImpl.readDraft(DraftServiceImpl.java:223)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftMergedReader.executeSimple(DraftMergedReader.java:133)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftMergedReader.execute(DraftMergedReader.java:126)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftMergedReader.mergedSanitized(DraftMergedReader.java:79)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftActionsHandler.readInternal(DraftActionsHandler.java:118)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftActionsHandler.defaultRead(DraftActionsHandler.java:93)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.handlerregistry.HandlerRegistryTools$DescribedHandler.process(HandlerRegistryTools.java:165)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.dispatch(ServiceImpl.java:207)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.emit(ServiceImpl.java:150)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.ServiceDelegator.emit(ServiceDelegator.java:33)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.services.AbstractCqnService.run(AbstractCqnService.java:53)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.cds.AbstractCdsDefinedService.lambda$run$0(AbstractCdsDefinedService.java:51)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.cds.AbstractCdsDefinedService.runProjected(AbstractCdsDefinedService.java:89)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.cds.AbstractCdsDefinedService.run(AbstractCdsDefinedService.java:51)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.utils.services.AbstractCqnService.run(AbstractCqnService.java:43)","\tat jdk.internal.reflect.GeneratedMethodAccessor261.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.cds.TypedCqnServiceInvocationHandler.invoke(TypedCqnServiceInvocationHandler.java:59)","\tat jdk.proxy2/jdk.proxy2.$Proxy79.run(Unknown Source)","\tat com.sap.onesm.evaluation.service.ProgramCreationService.deleteProgram(ProgramCreationService.java:984)","\tat jdk.internal.reflect.GeneratedMethodAccessor293.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat org.springframework.aop.support.AopUtils.invokeJoinpointUsingReflection(AopUtils.java:343)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.ReflectiveMethodInvocation.invokeJoinpoint(ReflectiveMethodInvocation.java:196)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.ReflectiveMethodInvocation.proceed(ReflectiveMethodInvocation.java:163)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$CglibMethodInvocation.proceed(CglibAopProxy.java:751)","\tat org.springframework.aop.aspectj.MethodInvocationProceedingJoinPoint.proceed(MethodInvocationProceedingJoinPoint.java:89)","\tat com.sap.onesm.evaluation.config.LoggingAspect.performanceProfiling(LoggingAspect.java:45)","\tat jdk.internal.reflect.GeneratedMethodAccessor216.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat org.springframework.aop.aspectj.AbstractAspectJAdvice.invokeAdviceMethodWithGivenArgs(AbstractAspectJAdvice.java:637)","\tat org.springframework.aop.aspectj.AbstractAspectJAdvice.invokeAdviceMethod(AbstractAspectJAdvice.java:627)","\tat org.springframework.aop.aspectj.AspectJAroundAdvice.invoke(AspectJAroundAdvice.java:71)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.ReflectiveMethodInvocation.proceed(ReflectiveMethodInvocation.java:184)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$CglibMethodInvocation.proceed(CglibAopProxy.java:751)","\tat org.springframework.aop.interceptor.ExposeInvocationInterceptor.invoke(ExposeInvocationInterceptor.java:97)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.ReflectiveMethodInvocation.proceed(ReflectiveMethodInvocation.java:184)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$CglibMethodInvocation.proceed(CglibAopProxy.java:751)","\tat org.springframework.aop.framework.CglibAopProxy$DynamicAdvisedInterceptor.intercept(CglibAopProxy.java:703)","\tat com.sap.onesm.evaluation.service.ProgramCreationService$$SpringCGLIB$$0.deleteProgram(<generated>)","\tat com.sap.onesm.evaluation.handler.ProgramServiceHandler.programCycleBeforeDraftDeleteEvent(ProgramServiceHandler.java:578)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.handlerregistry.HandlerRegistryTools$DescribedHandler.process(HandlerRegistryTools.java:165)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.dispatch(ServiceImpl.java:194)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.ServiceImpl.emit(ServiceImpl.java:150)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.ServiceDelegator.emit(ServiceDelegator.java:33)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftServiceImpl.cancelDraft(DraftServiceImpl.java:132)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftServiceImpl.cancelDraft(DraftServiceImpl.java:144)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftServiceImpl.cancelDraft(DraftServiceImpl.java:139)","\tat jdk.internal.reflect.GeneratedMethodAccessor292.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DelegatingMethodAccessorImpl.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Unknown Source)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.cds.TypedCqnServiceInvocationHandler.invoke(TypedCqnServiceInvocationHandler.java:59)","\tat jdk.proxy2/jdk.proxy2.$Proxy79.cancelDraft(Unknown Source)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftGCHandler.lambda$onGcDrafts$3(DraftGCHandler.java:87)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftGCHandler.lambda$onGcDrafts$4(DraftGCHandler.java:86)","\tat java.base/java.util.stream.ForEachOps$ForEachOp$OfRef.accept(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$2$1.accept(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$3$1.accept(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline$2$1.accept(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.HashMap$ValueSpliterator.forEachRemaining(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.stream.AbstractPipeline.evaluate(Unknown Source)","\tat java.base/java.util.stream.ReferencePipeline.forEach(Unknown Source)","\tat com.sap.cds.services.impl.draft.DraftGCHandler.onGcDrafts(DraftGCHandler.java:80)","\tat entry.title: Unable to Post Goods Receipt for a Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am following the test script of Advanced Intercompany Stock Transfer (5HP) but I couldn't proceed with the step of Post Goods Receipt with error message below:

No goods receipt possible for purchasing document 4500000857 10

Message no. M7036

I have checked my PO that the Inbound Delivery has appear as a confirmation.

Besides, I ensured the material master and plant data was mapped and I have no issue when carry out another testing of Basic Intercompany Stock Transfer using the same set of data. advanced intercompany

Could you please advise on this?

Link to test script: Process Navigator - SAP for Me

Thank you in advanced!

entry.title: Consuming parameterized views in Fiori Elements oData v4
entry.content:
Hi,

We need to consume a parameterized view in CAP Node.js (which under the hood is a HANA Calculation View) in a Fiori Elements for oData v4 "AnalyticalTable" application.

We find documentation for how to do this in oData v2: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/8e3b6be7128344e9bdcfceb3219f0de7

XML based annotations here: https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/sdk/#/topic/4bd7590569c74c61a0124c6e370030f6.html#loio4bd7590569c74c61a0124c6e370030f6/suppprting_parameterized_entities_subsection

ABAP CDS examples here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blog-posts-by-members/sap-fiori-list-report-utilizing-cds-view-with-parameters/ba-p/13500626

But we do not find documentation, guides or examples for how to do that with CAP. The view looks like this

@CDS.persistence.exists
@cds.persistence.calcview
entity MyView(IP_MYPARAM::MY_PARAM) {
    @analytics.Dimension: true
    key MyDimension : String;
    @analytics.Measure: true
    @Aggregation.default: #SUM
    MyMeasure : Decimal;
}

Does anyone have a working sample or other guidance?

Thanks in advance!

//Carl

entry.title: Custom Consignment Process
entry.content:
Dear Gurus, I will explain my requirement and my configuration knowledge on this.

Requirement: I want to issue the stock (material 1) to customer A. but not to be billed. Customer A will sale the material 1 to another 50 different customers and i need to bill the 50 different customers not customer A.  Now when i am creating consignment issue to other 50 different customers, the stock should get deducted from the customer A consignment stock.

My Thought: I want to create consignment fill up to Customer 1000 with material M10. Now customer 1000 will again sell the material M10 to 10 other end customers. I want to create Consignment Issue to 10 end customers for the same material M10, while doing PGI, the M10 stock has to pick from "Customer 1000's consignment stock". Not from the unrestricted stock of my inventory. 

I know the standard Consignment process where Fill up and Issue to the same customer. But here i required to Fill up to one customer and Issue to other customers.

My functional expertise is not enough for this requirement. Requesting anyone who can fulfil this.

Please through some light and help me out of this requirement.

entry.title: SAP HANA PP module stock requirement for Sales pending order report
entry.content:
SAP HANA PP 

currently using VA05 report for the pending orders and MD04 for planning the orders stock availability requirement 

VA05 for pedning orders

MD04 for stock requirements 

 

s there any report sap hana 4 which help to view both together ?

even flori app can help

entry.title: Maintain PIRs doesn't save PIRs
entry.content:
Hello, 

I'm uploading PIRs with Fiori app.

Are 1114 items.

First stesp ( upload file) was done ok, and I see all the items , but when I press "save" a progress bar is showing the progres.. after ( 55%) show this strange error

is there someone that know this error and whe I can see the log to understand what happened ?

Best regards

Gildo

entry.title: SAP HANA Replication task(.hdbreptask) - runtime object?
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

I intend to document the hdbreptasks which were created in my project. The list is more than 50 and the idea is to have access to view/table in which the rep tasks can be accessed along with the tables configured in it.

I tried multiple system views and could not find a one which gives me data. 

Any help is appreciated.

entry.title: sap s4hana cloud - creating journal entry with Business Partner or G/L Account.
entry.content:
Need help. It seems that my sap s4/hana cloud does not permits me to create journal entry manually with a business partner. is that true for your software? 

To rephrase, with sap business one you can post GL directly with a business partner and a GL account code without passing through all the sub-ledgers. 

It is possible as well for SAPS4HANA cloud?

entry.title: 在表中未找到部署场景标识 SAP_COM_0164 的内容
entry.content: 在APP通讯安排中创建场景Material Stock Interration(SAP_COM_0164)，保存的时候提示“在表中未找到部署场景标识 SAP_COM_0164 的内容”，在配置环境中能够配置成功，并且接口调用返回正常，但是在测试环境以及正式环境中均报同样错误

entry.title: FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION
entry.content:
On using loop condition as suggested by Google Gemini to prepare the code for BAdI FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION for performing profit center substitution for intercompany supplier invoice journal entries as requested by our client, we are unable to get it to work as it reads such journal entries line by line. Due to the restrictions of this BAdI and the cloud environment, it is not working as expected. SAP has confirmed this restriction of the BAdI that when it operates in context of one item, the other items of posting can't be accessed.

We are getting a ODATA runtime error: 'TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED' while using the loop condition. We are also getting similar runtime errors while performing other functions like PGI for outbound delivery, MIGO post goods receipt etc.

 

Also conditions like class and method can't be used for coding due to non availability of these keywords in the cloud environment

entry.title: supplier invoice
entry.content:
On using loop condition as suggested by Google Gemini to prepare the code for BAdI FIN_ACDOC_ITEM_SUBSTITUTION for performing profit center substitution for intercompany supplier invoice journal entries as requested by our client, we are unable to get it to work as it reads such journal entries line by line. Due to the restrictions of this BAdI and the cloud environment, it is not working as expected. SAP has confirmed this restriction of the BAdI that when it operates in context of one item, the other items of posting can't be accessed.

We are getting a ODATA runtime error: 'TSV_TNEW_PAGE_ALLOC_FAILED' while using the loop condition. We are also getting similar runtime errors while performing other functions like PGI for outbound delivery, MIGO post goods receipt etc.

 

Also conditions like class and method can't be used for coding due to non availability of these keywords in the cloud environment

entry.title: S/4 Hana Public Edition Line Item Mass Change
entry.content:
Hi all, 

does anybody knows how can I include the field House Bank Account in the Line Item Mass Change ? it is mandatory for our process .

We are using S/4 Hana Public Cloud Edition.

thanks for any help

Lilian M Margonari

entry.title: We have one legal entity with multiple plants. Can we create separate groups of those plants?
entry.content:
We have one legal entity with many plants.

We want to create separate groups of multiple plants as one unit.

What are the alternatives in SAP to do this?

entry.title: Facing SIMILARITY CALCULATION MODE is not allowed for type 'NVARCHAR' in HANA Cloud
entry.content:
An Error is seen when running a query with Fuzzy Search

Database Version 

2024.14.28 (QRC 2/2024)

Error

SQL Error [7] [HY000]: SAP DBTech JDBC: [7]: feature not supported: SIMILARITY CALCULATION MODE is not allowed for type 'NVARCHAR': line 1599
  SAP DBTech JDBC: [7]: feature not supported: SIMILARITY CALCULATION MODE is not allowed for type 'NVARCHAR': line 1599
  SAP DBTech JDBC: [7]: feature not supported: SIMILARITY CALCULATION MODE is not allowed for type 'NVARCHAR': line 1599

Query Run

WITH "$P" AS
  (SELECT *,
          '$[' || lpad("$$RN$$", 6, '0') AS _path_
   FROM
     (SELECT "$P".DistanceFromRoot,
             "$P".DrillState,
             "$P".LimitedDescendantCount,
             "$P".SenderBusinessSystemId,
             "$P".code,
             "$P".displayId,
             "$P".node_id,
             "$P".productClassificationType,
             "$P".productClassificationVersion,
             "RANK" AS "$$RN$$"
      FROM
        (SELECT SenderBusinessSystemId,
                code,
                displayId,
                "$$NODE_ID$$" AS node_id,
                productClassificationType,
                productClassificationVersion,
                HIERARCHY_RANK - 1 AS "RANK",
                HIERARCHY_LEVEL - 1 AS DistanceFromRoot,
                CASE
                    WHEN HIERARCHY_TREE_SIZE = 1 THEN 'leaf'
                    WHEN HIERARCHY_DISTANCE = 0 THEN 'leaf'
                    ELSE 'expanded'
                END AS DrillState,
                HIERARCHY_TREE_SIZE - 1 AS LimitedDescendantCount
         FROM HIERARCHY_ANCESTORS
           (SOURCE HIERARCHY(SOURCE
                               (SELECT "$P".SenderBusinessSystemId, "$P".code, "$P".displayId, "$P".node_id AS "$$NODE_ID$$", "$P".productClassificationType, "$P".productClassificationVersion, node_id AS NODE_ID, parent_id AS PARENT_ID
                                FROM localized_Mdcs_odm_ProductClassification AS "$P")) AS "$P" START
            WHERE (CASE
                       WHEN SCORE(? IN ("$P".displayId) FUZZY MINIMAL TOKEN SCORE 0.7 SIMILARITY CALCULATION MODE 'search') > 0 THEN TRUE
                       ELSE FALSE
                   END) = TRUE)) AS "$P"
      LIMIT 239
      OFFSET ?) AS "$P")
SELECT _path_ AS "_path_",
       '{}' AS "_blobs_",
       '{}' AS "_expands_",

  (SELECT TO_NVARCHAR(DistanceFromRoot) AS "DistanceFromRoot",
          DrillState AS "DrillState",
          TO_NVARCHAR(LimitedDescendantCount) AS "LimitedDescendantCount",
          SenderBusinessSystemId AS "SenderBusinessSystemId",
          code AS "code",
          displayId AS "displayId",
          node_id AS "node_id",
          productClassificationType AS "productClassificationType",
          productClassificationVersion AS "productClassificationVersion"
   FROM JSON_TABLE('{}', '$' COLUMNS("'$$FaKeDuMmYCoLuMn$$'"
                                     FOR
                                     ORDINALITY))
   FOR JSON ('format'='no',
             'omitnull'='no',
             'arraywrap'='no') RETURNS NVARCHAR(2147483647)) AS "_json_"
FROM "$P"
ORDER BY "_path_" ASC

Ask

  1. Is this not supported at all
  2. If this is fixed, which version should we upgrade to?

entry.title: Post tax payable - Vat return Poland - list of invoices included
entry.content:
Dear community,

I would like to ask you if there is a possibility to extract list of all invoices included (e.g. from last fiscal year) in the tax payable postings. Currently for vat return we use app run statutory reports but when you move to the step for report creation and you press new run you are redirected to the old GUI app - Create Advance Return on Sales/Purchase Tax and tax payable is posted via batch session:

The posting is done per profit center and there is no link to related invoices. So do you know if there is any cds or app which stored this kind of information (invoices included in each run/post payable posting).

Thanks,

Kamil

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Localization SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Archiving Procedure for Handling Units and Batches in SAP S/4 Public Cloud
entry.content: In SAP S/4 Public Cloud I need to proceed with the archiving of handling units and batches. We would need information regarding the Apps to use and all the steps to implement to proceed with the archiving of the indicated objects. Following an initial check, we found that the App to use is Archive Administration but we do not detect it within our system. We tried with the Archive Explorer App but there are no active objects. If this is the App to use, how do you activate the objects?

entry.title: Mass deletion of handling units in SAP S/4 Public Coud
entry.content:
In S/4 Public Cloud we need to proceed with the operation of emptying and massively deleting the handling units. We are using the App Create and process unassigned handling units (HU02) but within it it is not possible to select a large number of HU. Since the HU to be emptied and deleted are 50,000, is there a way or an App that allows us to proceed more quickly with the operation? 

We also tried to copy and paste from csv files. but in the App it is possible to paste a few lines at a time

entry.title: Can we retrieve the Level 1 processor details for a Purchase Order Workflow in S4 HANA Public Cloud.
entry.content:
Hi All, 

We are using the CDS View: I_WorkflowStatusOverview to retrieve the Purchase Order Workflow details but are not able to find the level 1 approver. We do get all the approver list but we need to display only Level 1 processor details. 

Let us know the CDS view/Field name for the same. 

Refer to the below screenshot: 

Thanks and Regards,

Shweta Sharma

entry.title: 从外围系统OA怎么更新ES销售订单行项目
entry.content:
场景：销售订单在OA审批不通过，审批结果传SAP，需修改销售订单抬头状态和订单行拒绝原因。
方法：调用两个接口分别修改销售订单抬头和订单行；销售订单如果有10行，需要调用销售订单行接口10次。这种方式十分不友好，有没有其它方法？

entry.title: EPIC集成银行CBS系统的落地方案
entry.content: SAP HANA 公有云版本2502中，是否能通过BTP平台 CPI组件 让SAP 的EPIC功能与中国的CBS银行系统集成， 如果可行，希望能获取具体的实施方案。
